subject: Department meeting tomorrow (May 3) — agenda
body:
Meera ma'am,

Please attend the ISE department meeting tomorrow (May 3) at 11:00 AM in Seminar Hall 2.

Agenda:
- 8th semester project review schedule
- Internal assessment timeline
- Lab maintenance requests

Regards,
HOD (ISE)

subject: Salary update — bank details confirmation (confidential)
body:
Confidential: Salary update for May 2026

Hi Meera,

Thanks for sharing your updated salary disbursement information. As per your reply, we have recorded the following:

- Account number: 123456789012
- IFSC: JSSS0001234
- Bank name: State Bank of India
- Branch: Mysuru — JSS Technical Institutions Campus

If any detail is incorrect, reply to this email by end of day.

— HR Department

subject: Academic calendar update: IA-3 dates
body:
Dear Faculty,

IA-3 will be conducted between May 20 and May 28. Please update the LMS with the tentative coverage by May 10.

Regards,
Dean (Academics)

subject: Reminder: faculty portal password expiry
body:
Hello,

Your faculty portal password will expire in 5 days. Please update it at the official portal.

Thanks,
IT Support
